Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

SpTU 3, 104 [Kalendertext][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
o 1o 1

ŠU

1

MAŠ

7

UŠ₂ ⸢UDU⸣.[NITA₂ I₃].UDU UDU.NITA₂ u SIG₂-ḪI.A UDU.NITA₂ ŠEŠ₂

Duʾuzu (IV)

1

Twins

7

You anoint (with) ram's blood, ram's fat or ram's wool.

o 22

MIN<(ŠU)>

2

SUḪUR

14

UŠ₂ UD₅ I₃.UDU UD₅ u SIG₂ UD₅ ŠEŠ₂

Ditto (Duʾuzu)

2

Goatfish

14

You anoint (with) goat's blood, goat's fat or goat's hair.

MIN<(ŠU)>

3

RIN₂

21

KANKALti₃ ŠEŠ₂

Ditto (Duʾuzu)

3

Scales

21

You anoint (with) uncultivated land.

Great One

(catchline)
r 88

NE

1

GU₄

7

UŠ₂ GU₄ lu I₃.GIŠ GU₄ lu SIG₂ GU₄ MIN<(ŠEŠ₂)>

Abu (V)

1

Bull of Heaven

7

Ditto (you anoint with) ox's blood or ox's fat or ox's hair.

(colophon)
r 99

IM BAša₂-a bu₁₂-kur₂ mdINANA—MU—KAM ŠA₃.BAL.BAL mE₂.KUR—za-kir lu₂MAŠ.MAŠ

Tablet of Iqiša, son of Ištar-šum-ereš, descendant of Ekur-zakir, incantation priest.

r 1010

mdINANA—MU—KAM DUMU-A.NI pa-liḫ d60 dEN.LIL₂ u de₂-a la₃ TUM₃-šu₂

Ištar-šumu-ereš, his son. He who reveres Anu, Ellil, and Ea shall not carry it off.

(rest of reverse blank)
